sessions.details: Recorded 1981-05-13. First TX 29 May 1981. No known commercial release.
Recorded 1973-02-27. No other details currently available.

transcript.text: This is National Radio 1. Well, hello there. This is TV on the Radio here, Thomas the Vance, and welcome once again to The Friday Rock Show.

Motorhead, and the Byron Band.
Some classics by Rush, and Rainbow and Uriah Heep, among others.
Not forgetting our Friday Night Connection.
But this evening, we start with this.
